name: whyll-agents-front
description: Front-end specialist agents for Nuxt 3 projects - builders for pages, components, stores, composables, API services, i18n, layouts, plugins, middleware, testing, and quality checking. Stack: Nuxt 3, Vue 3, Pinia, Axios, PrimeVue, Tailwind CSS, TypeScript, @nuxtjs/i18n, Vitest.
